chunks.text: Technical Reports - Aditya Parameswaran. AI-Assisted Dataset Discovery with DATASCOUT (EECS-2025-113) by Rachel Lin, Bhavya Chopra, Wenjing Lin, Shreya Shankar, Madelon Hulsebos and Aditya Parameswaran. Benchmarking Extraction of Structured Data from Templatized Documents (EECS-2025-77) by Mawil Hasan. Smash: A Dictionary-Free String Distance Metric that Considers Acronyms, Abbreviations, and Typos (EECS-2023-167) by Joshua Wu.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports by Aditya Parameswaran and others?
chunks.answer: AI-Assisted Dataset Discovery and Benchmarking Extraction.

chunks.text: Efficient Visualization Recommendation under Updates (EECS-2023-116) by Todd Yu. A Case Study on COVID-19 Intervention Visualizations: The Role of Trust, Beliefs, and Interpretations (EECS-2022-125) by Priyam Mohanty and Aditya Parameswaran. TOWARD EFFICIENT SPREADSHEET COMPUTATION AND VISUALIZATION (EECS-2022-67) by Christopher De Leon.
chunks.question: Which reports focus on visualization and spreadsheets?

chunks.text: HASTE: Serverless DAG Execution Optimizer (EECS-2021-181) by Avinash Arjavalingam. Spreadsheet Bubbles: Showing Contextually Relevant Data During Formula Editing (EECS-2021-145) by Nidhi Kakulawaram and John Zamfirescu-Pereira. A Spreadsheet Interface for Dataframes (EECS-2021-107) by Richard Lin.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports from 2021?
chunks.answer: HASTE, Spreadsheet Bubbles, and Dataframe Interface.
